title: SupremeTags
description: Give your players custom titles with style. Fully customizable, GUI-based, and placeholder-ready.
body:
<center> 

![SupremeTags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b6b42c5bfaf0f19ba75e9060c9f7b720e82fd4f_0.webp)

Requires **[NBTAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nbtapi)** To work

**What is SupremeTags?**

SupremeTags is a permission based tags plugin that gives your players the ability to select tags and showcase them around the server in chat/tab/scoreboard.

**What makes this tag plugin different, from other tag plugins?**

SupremeTags has features that other similar plugins do not include such as personal tags, animated tags, in-game tag editor(GUI Based) & multiple different hex/rgb support for chat plugins that may use.

You can also check below at the features it offers, guaranteed offers 10+ features that other do not have.

**There's an issue/bug where can I report it?**

You can get instant support from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/AnPwty8asP).</center>
​

**Dependencies:**
  
- NBTAPI
- Vault
- PlaceholderAPI
- ProtocolLib (Not Required)
- PacketEvents (Not Required)

**Supported Plugins:**

- Chat Plugins (Use {tag})
- HeadDatabase (hdb-<id>)
- ItemsAdder (itemsadder-<id>)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac11af11f14d6d8d173d5e4cfbac077b2c34a047_0.webp)

- Personal Tags - allows users to make their own personal tags with limits/settings and blacklisted word detection.
- Animated Tags - allows owners to make framed base strings for each tag and set interval speed.
- Tag Vouchers - very own built in tag item vouchers, allow players to withdraw tags and give to other players to redeem or put them in crates.
- Tag Variants - allows owners to set sub-styled tags for parent tags.
- Categories - categorizes tags into categories, with a main menu to select each category.
- Buyable tags - each global tag has its very own economy settings, support 6 economy types (giving more advanced control over tags)
- Tag editor - offers an ingame tag editor for you to easily edit any tag without having to go into tags.yml.
- Configuration Menu - offering a simple in-game config.yml editor, this simply allows you to toggle any option without having to touch the config file and auto reloads.
- Tag Effects - allows owners to set minecraft effects when tags are selected and auto unselects when tag is reset by user -- giving a more gameplay purpose rather than just cosmetic.
- Tag Rarities - offers a rarity system to owners that want to display what tag is rare than others, giving more value to tags.
- Sorting / Filtering Items - allows players to sort and filter tags in the GUI by different options, categories/all tags/rarity etc.
- Tag Custom Placeholders - offers a way for each tag to have their own personalized messages/strings.
- PlaceholderAPI Support - this is allowed everywhere, even in tags and custom menu items. (prevented in personal tags)

There's a lot more features/settings that are not listed in here... Just come test it for yourself. You won't be disappointed.
